standard_courses.name: Inclusive Community
standard_courses.description:
Please upload the completion certificate for the Inclusive Open Source Community Orientation (LFC102) course: https://training.linuxfoundation.org/training/inclusive-open-source-community-orientation-lfc102/

Once completed you can find the certificate in your openprofile.dev dashboard under Training & Certifications -> Certificates of Completion.
